abstract.t: This document defines BGP Signed Origin Delegation Attestation (SODA), an optional transitive BGP path attribute that carries a signed authorization, issued by the holder of an IP prefix, delegating origination of that prefix to a specified Autonomous System (AS) until a stated expiry time. Using SODA, a validator performing Route Origin Validation (ROV) can determine whether an ROV-Invalid result reflects an authorized delegation rather than a route hijack.
